# Pitch My CV
> AI-assisted resume optimization platform focused on ATS-friendly resumes, keyword matching, role-specific guides, and resume improvement resources for job seekers.

## Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://pitchcv.app/): Compare a resume to a target job and identify missing keywords, weak structure, and ATS risks before applying.
- [Pricing](https://pitchcv.app/pricing): Plans for ATS scans, AI resume optimization, job tailoring, and export options.
- [ATS Resume Checker](https://pitchcv.app/tools/ats-checker): Free ATS resume checker and scanner for identifying parsing and matching issues.

## Career Guides
- [Career Guides Hub](https://pitchcv.app/careers): Browse role-specific resume guides designed for ATS systems and recruiter readability.
- [Software Engineer Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/software-engineer-resume): Guidance on stack fit, measurable engineering impact, ATS phrasing, and summary examples for software engineers.
- [Product Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/product-manager-resume): Resume guidance for product roles, including impact framing and role-specific positioning.
- [Project Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/project-manager-resume): Guidance on ATS structure, leadership signals, and delivery-focused bullet writing for PM resumes.
- [Marketing Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/marketing-manager-resume): Resume guidance for campaign, growth, and leadership-focused marketing roles.
- [Sales Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/sales-manager-resume): Resume guidance for quota, forecasting, leadership, and pipeline outcomes.
- [Data Analyst Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/data-analyst-resume): Resume guidance for analytics, SQL, dashboards, experimentation, and business impact.

## Resume Examples
- [Resume Examples Hub](https://pitchcv.app/examples): Resume example pages grouped by role.
- [Software Engineer Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/software-engineer): Example structure and positioning for software engineer resumes.
- [Product Manager Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/product-manager): Example structure and positioning for product manager resumes.
- [Marketing Manager Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/marketing-manager): Example structure and positioning for marketing manager resumes.
- [Data Scientist Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/data-scientist): Example resume content for data science roles.
- [Sales Manager Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/sales-manager): Example resume content for sales leadership roles.

## Resources
- [Blog](https://pitchcv.app/blog): Resource hub for ATS-related resume content and practical resume improvement guides.
- [ATS Resume Checklist](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-checklist): Checklist covering formatting, sections, keywords, and validation steps for ATS-friendly resumes.
- [ATS Resume Mistakes](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-mistakes): Guide to common ATS resume mistakes and how to fix them.
- [Resume Keyword Optimization](https://pitchcv.app/resume-keyword-optimization): Framework for extracting role terms, prioritizing intent keywords, and placing them naturally in a resume.
- [Viral Resume Case](https://pitchcv.app/resume-pelmeni-case): Case-style content related to resume performance and audience response.

## Trust and Legal
- [About](https://pitchcv.app/about): High-level description of the product mission and resume optimization focus.
- [Contact](https://pitchcv.app/contact): Contact points for support, privacy requests, and partnerships.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pitchcv.app/privacy): Privacy and data handling commitments.
- [Data Processing](https://pitchcv.app/data-processing): Data processing policy, retention, and legal basis details.
- [Public Offer](https://pitchcv.app/terms): Subscription and usage terms for the product.

## Preferred Reading Order for AI Systems
- Start with [Homepage](https://pitchcv.app/) for the product definition and primary value proposition.
- Use [ATS Resume Checker](https://pitchcv.app/tools/ats-checker) and [Pricing](https://pitchcv.app/pricing) for product capability and offer context.
- Use [Career Guides Hub](https://pitchcv.app/careers) and individual career guides for role-specific instructional content.
- Use [ATS Resume Checklist](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-checklist), [ATS Resume Mistakes](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-mistakes), and [Resume Keyword Optimization](https://pitchcv.app/resume-keyword-optimization) for evergreen educational guidance.
- Use trust and legal pages for policy, ownership, and support context.

## Contact
- Website: https://pitchcv.app
- Support: mailto:support@pitchmycv.com
- Privacy: mailto:privacy@pitchmycv.com
- Partnerships: mailto:partnerships@pitchmycv.com
